model_formula: paired t-test: post - pre; average-SD Cohen's d
extraction_note: Paired-samples t test, POST - PRE, pairwise-complete. Effect size is the manuscript's average-SD d = mean_diff/((sd_pre+sd_post)/2). SPSS's difference-score d (dz) = 4.055 differs and is not what the article reports. Raw .sav holds 77 rows; 39 have complete pre/post on this item.
